name: Next Insurance SMB Digital Insurance API
what_it_does: Next Insurance SMB digital insurance REST API for platforms, financial institutions, and marketplaces to embed commercial insurance for small businesses including general liability, BOP (Business Owner's Policy), workers comp, commercial auto, professional liability, and tools/equipment coverage with instant underwriting, certificate of insurance generation, and policy management through Next Insurance's AI-driven underwriting platform. Enables AI agents to manage SMB insurance quoting for small business coverage automation, handle BOP policy binding for instant commercial insurance automation, access workers compensation enrollment for employer compliance automation, retrieve general liability certificate for contractor credential automation, manage policy endorsement for coverage modification automation, handle commercial auto binding for business vehicle coverage automation, access tools and equipment coverage for contractor asset automation, retrieve payment plan management for SMB premium financing automation, manage policy renewal for annual SMB insurance lifecycle automation, and integrate Next Insurance with SMB platforms, banks, and marketplaces for end-to-end small business insurance automation.
use_cases: Embedding instant liability insurance for SMB customers on banking and marketplace platforms
Generating certificates of insurance for contractor and vendor compliance automation agents
Binding workers compensation for small employer HR platform onboarding agents
Automating BOP quoting and binding for small business lending qualification agents
not_for: Large enterprise commercial insurance (Next focuses on businesses under $10M revenue)
Specialty or surplus lines (aviation, marine, professional liability for regulated industries)
International insurance (Next Insurance is US-only SMB platform)
best_when: A bank, marketplace, or SMB platform wanting AI agents to automate instant general liability, BOP, and workers comp insurance embedding for small business customers through Next Insurance's digital underwriting API.
avoid_when: PARTNER API REQUIRES FORMAL PROGRAM: Next Insurance partner API requires approved partner program enrollment; automated self-service API access creates no key issuance; automated standalone developer integration assumption creates unauthorized access. UNDERWRITING IS CLASS-CODE DRIVEN: Next Insurance instant underwriting uses NAICS/SIC class codes; automated quote must pass valid business class code; automated free-text business description without code creates invalid_class or wrong_appetite error. WORKERS COMP IS STATE-REGULATED: Next Insurance workers comp has state-specific availability and rates; automated workers comp binding must check state eligibility; automated 50-state workers comp assumption creates binding failure in non-admitted states. COI DELIVERY IS PDF URL NOT JSON: Next Insurance certificate of insurance is a PDF accessible via URL; automated COI as JSON object assumption creates missing certificate; automated COI retrieval must fetch PDF URL from policy endpoint.

auth.notes: Next Insurance uses OAuth 2.0 for partner API authentication. REST API with JSON. Palo Alto, CA HQ. Founded 2016 by Guy Goldstein, Nissim Tapiro, Alon Huri. Backed by Munich Re Ventures, FinTLV, American Express ($881M raised, $4B+ valuation). Products: GL, BOP, workers comp, commercial auto, professional liability, tools/equipment. SDKs: None public. Licensed in all 50 US states. AI-driven underwriting. Serves 480,000+ small businesses. Competes with Hiscox and Thimble for SMB digital insurance.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Partner sandbox available; production requires Next Insurance partner program
pricing.paid_tiers: Revenue share or referral fee model; premiums from $19/month for GL; BOP from $25/month; workers comp market rate
pricing.notes: Palo Alto CA. Munich Re/AmEx backed. $4B+ valuation. Revenue share partner model. US only.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; quote and bind APIs throttled; webhooks for policy lifecycle events

known_agent_gotchas: NAICS/SIC CLASS CODE REQUIRED: Next Insurance underwriting requires valid NAICS business class code; automated quote must map business description to NAICS code; automated free-text business type without code creates invalid_class error

WORKERS COMP STATE AVAILABILITY CHECK: Next Insurance workers comp is not available in all states (monopolistic states: OH, WA, ND, WY); automated workers comp bind must check state availability; automated 50-state assumption creates state_not_admitted rejection

PARTNER ENROLLMENT REQUIRED FOR PRODUCTION: Next Insurance partner API requires approved partner program; automated developer self-service creates no API credentials; automated sandbox-to-production assumption without partner approval creates access blocked

COI IS PDF URL IN POLICY RESPONSE: Next Insurance COI returned as PDF URL in policy object, not inline document; automated COI-as-JSON-object assumption creates missing certificate in downstream workflow

PAYMENT PLAN AFFECTS BINDING: Next Insurance supports monthly and annual payment; automated bind must specify payment_plan; automated default-annual assumption for monthly-preferring customer creates billing mismatch
agent_readiness.security_notes: SMB digital insurer. US state-licensed. OAuth2. US. Small business and employee data.

security_score_components.security_notes: SMB insurtech. US DOI regulated all 50 states. OAuth2. US. Business and employee personal data.
